title: LLM Classification Fallback (Stage 1)
description: JSON Schema for the Stage 1 LLM-fallback classification call. Fires only when heuristic rules produce a conflict, no match, or land within ±10% of a size threshold. The skill takes the top-1 answer if confidence>=0.6; otherwise marks the file unclassified and skips it. See references/classification-rules.md for the full taxonomy.

confidence.description: Model's self-reported confidence. The skill rejects results below 0.6.
